productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Winter Pink Top
description: Composition Pink melange sleeveless top made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, with a V-neck that has a scarf attached to the neckline, and a broad hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Don that uber cool look with this top from united colors of benetton. The scarf attached to the neck allows you to either tie it in front or simply let it hang across your shoulders, while the broad hem sits snug on your waist offering an absolutely comfortable Fit on the torso. Team this with jeans or denim skirts and sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
